overall_story_summary: Over 25 rounds, the guild managed goblin raids, missing caravans, and beast strikes while decoding a royal relic leading to deep ruins. The economy relied heavily on supply trades and gear repairs to deploy teams. Protagonists used cinematic LongLive interactions to coordinate missions and research artifacts.

round_summaries.story_summary: Goblin raid posted and artifact discovered. Members traded supplies and formed strike teams.
round_summaries.representative_interaction: Ren and Eri aligned tactics for the goblin raid.

round_summaries.story_summary: Vault scout returned and caravan went missing. Warehouse gravity anomaly handled via cinematic interactions.
round_summaries.representative_interaction: Sora and Sora stabilized floating warehouse crates.

round_summaries.story_summary: Beast lair strike requested. Heavy coordination to deploy arcane backup and repair gear.
round_summaries.representative_interaction: Renji and Mika organized the beast lair strike team.

round_summaries.story_summary: Beast core weapon assigned and ruins shortcut verified. Final expedition preparations concluded.
round_summaries.representative_interaction: Guild cadre finalized weapon assignments for the deep ruins.

quest_and_trade_summary: High quest momentum driven by sequential discoveries and urgent threats. Robust economy with 79 supply trades and 21 gear repairs resolving bottlenecks.
video_prompt_chain_summary: Prompts focused on cooperative tasks like map reading and magical stabilization, using a 0-10 second split to transition from setup to collaborative resolution.

notable_video_jobs.reason_to_use_longlive: Cinematic map reading and quest sealing.
